Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Southbound  Reroute near Cicero/Irving Park
ShortDescription: SB 54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Cicero/Irving Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Irving Park, Laramie, Addison, then resume their normal route on Cicero due to street blockage near Cicero/Irving Park.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
